raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The opioid crisis in California resulted in the deaths of over 6,800 individuals last year.",
    "An average of 53 people die each month from accidental drug overdoses in Assemblymember Haney's district.",
    "The Select Committee on Fentanyl, Overdose Prevention & Opioids has been created to address the opioid epidemic in California.",
    "The committee will focus on public health responses, law enforcement responses, and current medical practices for treating opioid addiction.",
    "Drug overdoses have cost the United States many more lives than COVID-19.",
    "Some teens and young adults are reportedly using as many as 10 fentanyl pills a day.",
    "The youngest patient reported to be addicted to fentanyl was just 12 years old.",
    "Many individuals struggling with opioid addiction have experienced challenges in accessing help.",
    "Fentanyl overdose deaths in Orange County totaled approximately 432 in 2020.",
    "The state needs to implement policies to provide tools and resources for individuals addicted to controlled substances."
  ]
}
```
